import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(text, i).ok_or(0)
    match b
    when Ok(bv)
      if bv == 32 or bv == 9 or bv == 10 or bv == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(bv)}"
      end
    when Err(_)
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  match list.max(nums)
  when Some(m)
    println("max=#{m}")
  when None
    ()
  end
  match list.min(nums)
  when Some(m)
    println("min=#{m}")
  when None
    ()
  end
end
